blended.narrative: Mount Bohemia is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,544 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
